# atlassian_jira_group (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_group" "example" {
  name = "example-group"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the group. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the group.
